title: ED diarrhea documentation
source_review_basis: full authoritative documents inspected and archived; item-level retain/rewrite/remove/add comparisons recorded

assessment.text: Defines acute diarrheal illness and records stool frequency, duration, nausea, vomiting, fever, abdominal pain, exposure pattern, and dehydration features.
assessment.rationale: The exact DHA adult gastroenteritis history section supports onset, duration, severity, associated symptoms, relevant negatives and risk context for adult diarrhea without diagnosing gastroenteritis.

source.title: DHA Telehealth Clinical Guidelines for Virtual Management of Gastroenteritis in Adults – 41
source.setting: Telehealth services in DHA-licensed health facilities.
source.exclusions: Direct for adult Dubai telehealth gastroenteritis documentation; partial for a broad diarrhea workflow without an adult or acute-duration filter.
source.evidence_paraphrase: Defines acute diarrheal illness and records stool frequency, duration, nausea, vomiting, fever, abdominal pain, exposure pattern, and dehydration features.

assessment.text: Lists shock, severe dehydration, intractable vomiting, severe abdominal pain, prolonged symptoms, older age, comorbidity, pregnancy, antibiotic exposure, nocturnal diarrhea, and bloody or black stool.
assessment.rationale: The exact red-flag section supports measured vital data, general appearance and time-critical symptoms only when assessed.

source.title: DHA Telehealth Clinical Guidelines for Virtual Management of Gastroenteritis in Adults – 41
source.setting: Telehealth services in DHA-licensed health facilities.
source.exclusions: Direct for adult Dubai telehealth gastroenteritis documentation; partial for a broad diarrhea workflow without an adult or acute-duration filter.
source.evidence_paraphrase: Lists shock, severe dehydration, intractable vomiting, severe abdominal pain, prolonged symptoms, older age, comorbidity, pregnancy, antibiotic exposure, nocturnal diarrhea, and bloody or black stool.

assessment.text: Describes history-based assessment and investigation for suspected nonviral or complicated gastroenteritis.
assessment.rationale: The exact investigation section supports recording existing test results reviewed by the clinician without recommending testing.

source.title: DHA Telehealth Clinical Guidelines for Virtual Management of Gastroenteritis in Adults – 41
source.setting: Telehealth services in DHA-licensed health facilities.
source.exclusions: Direct for adult Dubai telehealth gastroenteritis documentation; partial for a broad diarrhea workflow without an adult or acute-duration filter.
source.evidence_paraphrase: Describes history-based assessment and investigation for suspected nonviral or complicated gastroenteritis.

assessment.text: Defines emergency and face-to-face referral features for adult gastroenteritis.
assessment.rationale: The exact referral section supports recording escalation, specialist discussion or handover only when already decided or arranged.

source.title: DHA Telehealth Clinical Guidelines for Virtual Management of Gastroenteritis in Adults – 41
source.setting: Telehealth services in DHA-licensed health facilities.
source.exclusions: Direct for adult Dubai telehealth gastroenteritis documentation; partial for a broad diarrhea workflow without an adult or acute-duration filter.
source.evidence_paraphrase: Defines emergency and face-to-face referral features for adult gastroenteritis.

assessment.text: Defines adult gastroenteritis use in DHA-licensed telehealth and excludes emergency and controlled-medication scenarios.
assessment.rationale: The adult virtual-care scope was reviewed; pediatric, chronic, inflammatory, surgical and immunocompromised presentations remain outside direct scope.
